subcodes.title: Interview with Prof. Henri Bergson, Paris, ca. Jan. 1913
subcodes.first_line: Between the naturalists and the divines there existeth unanimity of view in one matter, and that is this: that throughout creation all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بین طبیعیون و الهیون در یک مورد وحدت نظر وجود دارد و آن این است که خلقت جمیع
